name: Bharathi Park
description: A lush, well-maintained green park located at the exact center of the French Quarter, featuring the stunning Aayi Mandapam monument at its core.
history: The Aayi Mandapam was built in the 19th century by Napoleon III to honor Aayi, a local courtesan who demolished her house to supply water to the city.
famousFor: Aayi Mandapam, peaceful walking paths, and heritage buildings.
